name: Ardois-Bonnot
summary: A fantastic painter who hung a blasphemous "Dream Landscape" in the Paris spring salon of 1926.
description:
Ardois-Bonnot, a fantastic painter, hung a blasphemous "Dream Landscape" in the Paris spring salon of 1926.

The record preserves nothing further of him.

sources.quote: a fantastic painter named Ardois-Bonnot hangs a blasphemous Dream Landscape in the Paris spring salon of 1926
